data.customization#Customization:
Override tokens to match your brand:
:root { --primitive-color-primary: #8b5cf6; --primitive-radius-md: 0.75rem; --primitive-font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; }
data.design-token-deep-dive#Design Token Deep: Design Token Deep DiveLearn how PrimitiveKit’s comprehensive design token system enables complete customization without touching component code.
data.dtcg-specification#DTCG Specification: PrimitiveKit follows the Design Tokens Community Group specification for maximum interoperability.
data.learn-more#Learn More: Full Token Reference Theming Guide Customization Examples
data.token-categories#Token Categories: PrimitiveKit organizes tokens into logical categories:
data.what-are-design-tokens#What are Design T: Design tokens are the visual design atoms of your design system. They’re named entities that store visual design attributes like colors, spacing, typography, and more.

data.basic-usage#Basic Usage:
Import components and start building:
import { Button, Card, Alert } from '@primitivekit/react'; function App() { return ( <Card> <Alert variant="info"> Welcome to PrimitiveKit! </Alert> <Button variant="primary"> Get Started </Button> </Card> ); }
data.design-tokens#Design Tokens:
PrimitiveKit uses 600+ design tokens for complete customization:
:root { --primitive-color-primary: #0ea5e9; --primitive-spacing-md: 1rem; --primitive-radius-md: 0.5rem; }
data.getting-started-with-primitivekit#Gettin: Getting Started with PrimitiveKitWelcome to PrimitiveKit! This guide will help you get up and running with our component library in just a few minutes.
data.installation#Installation:
Install PrimitiveKit using your preferred package manager:
npm install @primitivekit/react Or with yarn:
yarn add @primitivekit/react
data.next-steps#Next Steps: Explore the Component Documentation Learn about Design Tokens Check out Customization Guide Happy building! 🚀

data: Welcome to PrimitiveKit documentation! This guide will help you get started with building beautiful, accessible user interfaces.
data.angular#Angular: import { Component } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-button', template: ` Click me `, styleUrls: ['@primitivekit/react/tokens/tokens.css'] }) export class ButtonComponent {}
data.htmlcss#HTML/CSS: <button class="pk-button pk-button--primary"> Click me </button> <style> @import '@primitivekit/react/tokens/tokens.css'; .pk-button { padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-4); background: var(--color-primary-500); color: white; border: none; border-radius: var(--border-radius-md); } </style>
data.next-steps#Next Steps: Installation Guide - Detailed installation instructions Customization - Learn how to customize components Design Tokens - Explore the design token system Components - Browse all available components
data.vue#Vue: <template> <button class="pk-button pk-button--primary"> Click me </button> </template> <script setup> import '@primitivekit/react/tokens/tokens.css'; </script>
data.what-is-primitivekit#What is PrimitiveKi:
PrimitiveKit is a flexible, accessible component library designed for modern web development. It provides:
38 Production-Ready Components - Everything from basic buttons to complex data tables 600+ Design Tokens - Comprehensive design system following industry standards Zero Hardcoded Values - Complete customization via CSS variables Multi-Framework Support - Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, and HTML/CSS Full Accessibility - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant with keyboard navigation and screen reader support TypeScript First - Complete type safety out of the box

data: PrimitiveKit components are built with accessibility as a core principle, following WCAG 2.1 AA standards.
data.color-contrast#Color Contrast:
All default color combinations meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards:
✅ Text contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 ✅ Large text contrast ratio of at least 3:1 ✅ Interactive element contrast ratio of at least 3:1 Note: When customizing colors, ensure you maintain proper contrast ratios for accessibility.
data.focus-management#Focus Management:
Components handle focus appropriately:
✅ Visible focus indicators on all interactive elements ✅ Focus trap in modals and drawers ✅ Focus restoration when closing overlays ✅ Skip links for navigation
data.keyboard-navigation#Keyboard Navigation:
All interactive components support keyboard navigation:
Key Action Tab Move focus to next interactive element Shift + Tab Move focus to previous interactive element Enter / Space Activate buttons and links Arrow Keys Navigate within components (tabs, menus, etc.) Escape Close modals, dropdowns, and overlays
data.overview#Overview:
Every component in PrimitiveKit is designed to be accessible by default:
✅ Semantic HTML elements ✅ ARIA attributes where needed ✅ Keyboard navigation support ✅ Screen reader compatibility ✅ Focus management ✅ Color contrast compliance
data.resources#Resources: WCAG 2.1 Quick Reference ARIA Authoring Practices Guide WebAIM Contrast Checker
data.screen-reader-support#Screen Reader Supp: Components include proper ARIA labels and descriptions for screen readers: We'll never share your email
data.testing-accessibility#Testing Accessibil:
We recommend testing your implementation with:
✅ Screen readers (NVDA, JAWS, VoiceOver) ✅ Keyboard-only navigation ✅ Browser accessibility tools (Lighthouse, axe DevTools) ✅ Color contrast checkers Important: While PrimitiveKit components are accessible by default, full WCAG compliance requires proper implementation and testing in your specific application context.

data.-in-development-33-components#🚧 In Devel:
These components have structure in place and are being actively developed:
All other components listed above
data.-production-ready-6-components#✅ Product:
These components have complete feature parity and are production-ready:
CardComponent - All variants, hoverable, clickable BadgeComponent - All color schemes, sizes, variants TagComponent - Closable, icons, events AvatarComponent - Image fallback, sizes, shapes DividerComponent - Orientations, variants, labels SpaceComponent - Directions, sizes, alignment, wrap
data.angular-components#Angular Components: Angular ComponentsPrimitiveKit for Angular provides 39 production-ready standalone components with complete TypeScript support.
data.data-display-components#Data Display Com: AvatarComponent - User avatar TagComponent - Tag label TableComponent - Data table CollapseComponent - Collapsible content ImageComponent - Image component EmptyComponent - Empty state TypographyComponent - Text styling
data.event-handling#Event Handling:
Standard Angular event binding:
<pk-button (click)="handleClick()" (focus)="handleFocus()"> Click Me </pk-button>
data.features#Features: ✅ 39 Components - Complete component library ✅ Standalone Components - No NgModule required ✅ TypeScript - Full type definitions included ✅ 600+ Design Tokens - Comprehensive customization ✅ Zero Hardcoded Values - Everything customizable via CSS variables ✅ Accessible - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant ✅ Tree Shakeable - Import only what you need
data.feedback-components#Feedback Components: AlertComponent - Alert messages BadgeComponent - Status indicators SpinnerComponent - Loading spinner ProgressComponent - Progress bar SkeletonComponent - Loading placeholder
data.form-components#Form Components: ButtonComponent - Interactive button InputComponent - Text input field SelectComponent - Dropdown selection CheckboxComponent - Checkbox input RadioComponent - Radio button SwitchComponent - Toggle switch TextareaComponent - Multi-line text input SliderComponent - Range slider FormComponent - Form wrapper UploadComponent - File upload
data.layout-components#Layout Components: CardComponent - Flexible container with variants ContainerComponent - Responsive content wrapper GridComponent - Flexible grid system StackComponent - Vertical/horizontal stacking SpaceComponent - Spacing between elements DividerComponent - Visual separator
data.navigation-components#Navigation Compone: LinkComponent - Navigation link BreadcrumbComponent - Breadcrumb navigation TabsComponent - Tab navigation MenuComponent - Navigation menu StepsComponent - Step indicator PaginationComponent - Page navigation
data.overlay-components#Overlay Components: ModalComponent - Modal dialog DrawerComponent - Side drawer TooltipComponent - Tooltip overlay PopoverComponent - Popover overlay DropdownComponent - Dropdown menu
data.quick-start#Quick Start: import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { CardComponent, ButtonComponent, BadgeComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular'; import '@primitivekit/angular/tokens/tokens.css'; @Component({ selector: 'app-root', standalone: true, imports: [CardComponent, ButtonComponent, BadgeComponent], template: ` Welcome to PrimitiveKit New Click Me ` }) export class AppComponent { handleClick() { alert('Hello!'); } }
data.standalone-components#Standalone Compone:
All components are standalone and don’t require NgModule:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { CardComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular'; @Component({ selector: 'app-example', standalone: true, imports: [CardComponent], template: `Content` }) export class ExampleComponent {}

data.accessibility#Accessibility:
The Alert component is fully accessible and follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards:
✅ Semantic HTML elements ✅ Keyboard accessible ✅ Focus visible indicator ✅ Proper ARIA attributes ✅ Screen reader compatible ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum) ✅ Color contrast compliance
data.alert#Alert: AlertFeedback component for displaying important messages, warnings, or notifications.

<pk-alert [style]="{ '--alert-bg-color': '#007bff', '--alert-text-color': '#ffffff' }">Custom</pk-alert>

These components have complete feature parity and are production-ready:

data.astro-components#Astro Components: Astro ComponentsPrimitiveKit for Astro provides 39 production-ready components optimized for static site generation with zero JavaScript by default.
data.client-directives#Client Directives:
Add interactivity when needed:
--- import { Button } from '@primitivekit/astro'; --- Click Me
data.component-frontmatter#Component Frontmat:
Use Astro’s frontmatter for logic:
--- const { variant = 'elevated', hoverable = false, ...props } = Astro.props; const classes = [ 'card', `card--${variant}`, hoverable && 'card--hoverable' ].filter(Boolean).join(' '); ---
data.data-display-components#Data Display Com: Avatar - User avatar Tag - Tag label Table - Data table Collapse - Collapsible content Image - Image component Empty - Empty state Typography - Text styling
data.features#Features: ✅ 39 Components - Complete component library ✅ Zero JavaScript - Static by default ✅ TypeScript - Full type definitions included ✅ 600+ Design Tokens - Comprehensive customization ✅ Zero Hardcoded Values - Everything customizable via CSS variables ✅ Accessible - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant ✅ Perfect Lighthouse Scores - Optimized for performance ✅ SSG Optimized - Built for static site generation
data.feedback-components#Feedback Components: Alert - Alert messages Badge - Status indicators Spinner - Loading spinner Progress - Progress bar Skeleton - Loading placeholder
data.form-components#Form Components: Button - Interactive button Input - Text input field Select - Dropdown selection Checkbox - Checkbox input Radio - Radio button Switch - Toggle switch Textarea - Multi-line text input Slider - Range slider Form - Form wrapper Upload - File upload
data.layout-components#Layout Components: Card - Flexible container with variants Container - Responsive content wrapper Grid - Flexible grid system Stack - Vertical/horizontal stacking Space - Spacing between elements Divider - Visual separator
data.navigation-components#Navigation Compone: Link - Navigation link Breadcrumb - Breadcrumb navigation Tabs - Tab navigation Menu - Navigation menu Steps - Step indicator Pagination - Page navigation
data.overlay-components#Overlay Components: Modal - Modal dialog Drawer - Side drawer Tooltip - Tooltip overlay Popover - Popover overlay Dropdown - Dropdown menu
data.performance-benefits#Performance Benefit: Zero JavaScript by default - Components ship as pure HTML/CSS Partial Hydration - Add interactivity only where needed Perfect Lighthouse Scores - Optimized for Core Web Vitals Fast Page Loads - Minimal bundle size SEO Friendly - Server-rendered HTML
data.props-interface#Props Interface:
Define TypeScript interfaces for props:
--- interface Props { variant?: 'elevated' | 'outlined' | 'flat'; hoverable?: boolean; clickable?: boolean; } const { variant = 'elevated', hoverable = false, clickable = false } = Astro.props; ---
data.quick-start#Quick Start: --- import { Card, Button, Badge } from '@primitivekit/astro'; import '@primitivekit/astro/tokens/tokens.css'; --- Welcome to PrimitiveKit New Click Me
data.static-by-default#Static by Default:
Components render as static HTML with no JavaScript:
Static Content No JavaScript needed!

data: PrimitiveKit components are built with zero hardcoded values. Every visual property is customizable via CSS variables.
data.component-specific-variables#Component-S:
Each component has its own set of CSS variables. Check the component documentation for the complete list.
Tip: Use your browser’s DevTools to inspect components and see all available CSS variables.
data.css-variables#CSS Variables: Each component exposes 50-150+ CSS variables that control every aspect of its appearance. You can customize these variables globally or per-component instance.
data.custom-theme#Custom Theme: :root { /* Primary colors */ --btn-primary-bg: rgba(139, 92, 246, 1); --btn-primary-hover: rgba(124, 58, 237, 1); /* Border radius */ --btn-border-radius: 0.75rem; --input-border-radius: 0.75rem; --card-border-radius: 1rem; /* Spacing */ --btn-padding-x: 2rem; --btn-padding-y: 0.75rem; }
data.dark-mode#Dark Mode:
All components support dark mode out of the box. Add the dark class to your root element:
<html class="dark"> <body> <Button>Dark Mode Button</Button> </body> </html> Dark mode uses pure black backgrounds (#000000) and adjusted color values for optimal contrast.
data.minimal-design#Minimal Design: :root { /* Remove shadows */ --btn-shadow: none; --card-shadow: none; /* Minimal borders */ --btn-border-width: 1px; --input-border-width: 1px; /* Square corners */ --btn-border-radius: 0; --input-border-radius: 0; --card-border-radius: 0; }
data.rgba-colors#RGBA Colors:
All colors in PrimitiveKit use RGBA format for better transparency control:
/* Good - RGBA format */ --btn-bg-color: rgba(59, 130, 246, 1); --btn-bg-color-hover: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.8); /* Avoid - Hex format */ --btn-bg-color: #3b82f6;

data: PrimitiveKit includes 600+ design tokens following the DTCG specification and industry best practices.

data.angular#Angular:
Best for: Enterprise applications, large-scale projects, TypeScript-first teams
Pros:
✅ Standalone components ✅ Full framework (routing, forms, HTTP) ✅ Strong TypeScript integration ✅ Enterprise-ready ✅ Opinionated structure Cons:
❌ Steeper learning curve ❌ Larger bundle size ❌ More boilerplate Example:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { CardComponent, ButtonComponent } from '@primitivekit/angular'; @Component({ selector: 'app-root', standalone: true, imports: [CardComponent, ButtonComponent], template: ` Click Me ` }) export class AppComponent { handleClick() { alert('Hello!'); } } View Angular Docs →
data.astro#Astro:
Best for: Content-focused sites, blogs, documentation, marketing pages
Pros:
✅ Zero JavaScript by default ✅ Perfect Lighthouse scores ✅ Static site generation ✅ Partial hydration ✅ Multi-framework support Cons:
❌ Limited interactivity by default ❌ Newer framework ❌ Smaller ecosystem Example:
--- import { Card, Button } from '@primitivekit/astro'; --- Click Me View Astro Docs →

Actual sizes vary based on usage.

data.react#React:
Best for: Single-page applications, complex UIs, large teams
Pros:
✅ Most mature implementation (v0.2.1) ✅ Largest ecosystem ✅ Excellent TypeScript support ✅ Hooks-based API ✅ Great developer tools Cons:
❌ Larger bundle size ❌ Requires React knowledge ❌ Virtual DOM overhead Example:
import { Card, Button } from '@primitivekit/react'; function App() { return ( <Card variant="elevated"> <Button onClick={() => alert('Hello!')}> Click Me </Button> </Card> ); } View React Docs →
data.shared-features#Shared Features:
All frameworks share these features:
✅ Same CSS - All use identical CSS files ✅ Same Design Tokens - 600+ shared tokens ✅ Same API - Consistent prop names ✅ Same Customization - CSS variables work everywhere ✅ Same Accessibility - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant ✅ TypeScript Support - Full type definitions ✅ Tree Shaking - Import only what you need
data.still-not-sure#Still Not Sure?:
Start with your team’s existing framework knowledge. PrimitiveKit works great with all of them!
Need help deciding? Open a discussion on GitHub
data.svelte#Svelte:
Best for: Performance-critical apps, small bundle sizes, modern development
Pros:
✅ Smallest bundle size ✅ No virtual DOM ✅ Reactive by default ✅ Easy to learn ✅ Great performance Cons:
❌ Smaller ecosystem ❌ Less mature tooling ❌ Fewer job opportunities Example:
<script lang="ts"> import { Card, Button } from '@primitivekit/svelte'; function handleClick() { alert('Hello!'); } </script> <Card variant="elevated"> <Button on:click={handleClick}> Click Me </Button> </Card> View Svelte Docs →
data.vanilla-javascript#Vanilla JavaScript:
Best for: No build step, legacy projects, maximum control, learning
Pros:
✅ Zero dependencies ✅ No build step required ✅ Works anywhere ✅ CDN support ✅ Maximum control Cons:
❌ More manual work ❌ No reactivity system ❌ Imperative API Example:
import { Card, Button } from '@primitivekit/vanilla'; const card = new Card({ variant: 'elevated' }); const button = new Button({ text: 'Click Me', onClick: () => alert('Hello!') }); card.mount(document.body); View Vanilla JS Docs →
data.vue#Vue:
Best for: Progressive web apps, modern SPAs, flexible architecture
Pros:
✅ Composition API ✅ Excellent reactivity ✅ Great documentation ✅ Smaller bundle size ✅ Easy to learn Cons:
❌ Smaller ecosystem than React ❌ Less corporate backing Example:
<script setup lang="ts"> import { Card, Button } from '@primitivekit/vue'; </script> <template> <Card variant="elevated"> <Button @click="alert('Hello!')"> Click Me </Button> </Card> </template> View Vue Docs →

import '@primitivekit/{framework}/tokens/tokens.css'; This file contains 600+ CSS variables that power all components. You only need to import it once in your application’s entry point.

data.tree-shaking#Tree Shaking:
All packages support tree shaking. Import only the components you need:
// ✅ Good - Only imports Button import { Button } from '@primitivekit/react'; // ❌ Avoid - Imports everything import * as PrimitiveKit from '@primitivekit/react';

All packages include TypeScript definitions. No additional @types packages needed.
import type { ButtonProps } from '@primitivekit/react'; const props: ButtonProps = { variant: 'primary', size: 'medium', disabled: false };

data.features#Features: ✅ 39 Components - Complete component library ✅ Reactive Declarations - Svelte’s reactive system ✅ TypeScript - Full type definitions included ✅ 600+ Design Tokens - Comprehensive customization ✅ Zero Hardcoded Values - Everything customizable via CSS variables ✅ Accessible - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant ✅ Tree Shakeable - Import only what you need ✅ Tiny Bundle Size - Svelte’s compiler magic

data.overlay-components#Overlay Components: Modal - Modal dialog Drawer - Side drawer Tooltip - Tooltip overlay Popover - Popover overlay Dropdown - Dropdown menu

data.instructions#Instructions: Look at the bottom-right corner of the page You should see a blue floating button that says “Frameworks” Click it to open the mega menu The menu should show all 6 frameworks with logos
data.test-page#Test Page: Test PageThis is a test page to verify the framework switcher is working.
data.troubleshooting#Troubleshooting:
If you don’t see the button:
Try refreshing the page (Cmd+R or Ctrl+R) Try hard refresh (Cmd+Shift+R or Ctrl+Shift+R) Check if JavaScript is enabled Check browser console for errors
data.what-you-should-see#What You Should See: Floating Button: Blue pill-shaped button in bottom-right Text: “Frameworks” with icons On Click: Mega menu appears above the button Menu Content: 6 framework cards with logos Scroll down to see the floating button stays in place The button should remain fixed in the bottom-right corner as you scroll.

data.2-maintain-contrast#2. Maintain Contrast:
Ensure sufficient color contrast for accessibility:
/* ✅ Good - 4.5:1 contrast ratio */ --color-text: #212529; --color-bg: #ffffff; /* ❌ Poor - Low contrast */ --color-text: #cccccc; --color-bg: #ffffff;
data.3-test-both-themes#3. Test Both Themes: Always test your application in both light and dark modes.
data.4-use-css-variables-consistently#4. Use: /* ✅ Good */ .button { background: var(--button-primary-bg); color: var(--button-primary-color); } /* ❌ Avoid hardcoded values */ .button { background: #007bff; color: #ffffff; }
data.basic-theme#Basic Theme: :root { /* Primary colors */ --color-primary: #007bff; --color-primary-hover: #0056b3; --color-primary-active: #004085; /* Text colors */ --color-text: #212529; --color-text-secondary: #6c757d; /* Background colors */ --color-bg: #ffffff; --color-bg-secondary: #f8f9fa; }
data.brand-theme#Brand Theme: :root { /* Brand colors */ --color-primary: #ff6b6b; --color-secondary: #4ecdc4; --color-accent: #ffe66d; /* Typography */ --font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; --font-size-base: 16px; /* Spacing */ --spacing-unit: 8px; /* Border radius */ --border-radius-sm: 4px; --border-radius-md: 8px; --border-radius-lg: 16px; }
data.button-theme#Button Theme: :root { /* Button colors */ --button-primary-bg: #007bff; --button-primary-color: #ffffff; --button-primary-hover-bg: #0056b3; /* Button sizes */ --button-padding-sm: 4px 12px; --button-padding-md: 8px 16px; --button-padding-lg: 12px 24px; /* Button borders */ --button-border-radius: 8px; --button-border-width: 1px; }
data.examples#Examples: Check out our Showcase for real-world theming examples.
data.input-theme#Input Theme: :root { /* Input colors */ --input-bg: #ffffff; --input-border: #ced4da; --input-focus-border: #007bff; --input-text: #212529; /* Input sizes */ --input-padding: 8px 12px; --input-height: 40px; /* Input borders */ --input-border-radius: 4px; --input-border-width: 1px; }
data.manual-dark-mode-toggle#Manual Dark Mode: /* Light theme (default) */ :root { --color-bg: #ffffff; --color-text: #212529; } /* Dark theme */ [data-theme="dark"] { --color-bg: #212529; --color-text: #ffffff; } // Toggle dark mode function ThemeToggle() { const [theme, setTheme] = useState('light'); const toggleTheme = () => { const newTheme = theme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light'; setTheme(newTheme); document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', newTheme); }; return ( <Button onClick={toggleTheme}> Toggle {theme === 'light' ? 'Dark' : 'Light'} Mode </Button> ); }
data.multiple-themes#Multiple Themes: /* Default theme */ :root { --color-primary: #007bff; } /* Ocean theme */ [data-theme="ocean"] { --color-primary: #0077be; --color-secondary: #00a8e8; --color-accent: #00c9ff; } /* Forest theme */ [data-theme="forest"] { --color-primary: #2d6a4f; --color-secondary: #40916c; --color-accent: #52b788; } /* Sunset theme */ [data-theme="sunset"] { --color-primary: #ff6b6b; --color-secondary: #ee5a6f; --color-accent: #f4a261; }
data.overview#Overview: PrimitiveKit uses CSS variables (custom properties) for theming, making it easy to create light/dark themes or completely custom color schemes.
data.react-context#React Context: import { createContext, useContext, useState } from 'react'; const ThemeContext = createContext(); export function ThemeProvider({ children }) { const [theme, setTheme] = useState('light'); const applyTheme = (themeName) => { setTheme(themeName); document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', themeName); }; return ( <ThemeContext.Provider value={{ theme, applyTheme }}> {children} </ThemeContext.Provider> ); } export function useTheme() { return useContext(ThemeContext); }

data.-in-development-33-components#🚧 In Devel:
These components have structure in place and are being actively developed:
All other components listed above
data.-production-ready-6-components#✅ Product:
These components have complete feature parity and are production-ready:
Card - All variants, hoverable, clickable Badge - All color schemes, sizes, variants Tag - Closable, icons, events Avatar - Image fallback, sizes, shapes Divider - Orientations, variants, labels Space - Directions, sizes, alignment, wrap
data.browser-support#Browser Support: Chrome (latest) Firefox (latest) Safari (latest) Edge (latest) No IE11 support (uses modern JavaScript)
data.card-with-content#Card with Content:
import { Card, Badge } from '@primitivekit/vanilla'; const badge = new Badge({ text: 'New', variant: 'solid', color: 'primary' }); const card = new Card({ variant: 'elevated', children: [ 'Card Title', 'Card content goes here.
', badge ] }); card.mount(document.getElementById('app'));
data.cdn-usage#CDN Usage: <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/@primitivekit/vanilla/dist/tokens/tokens.css"> <script src="https://unpkg.com/@primitivekit/vanilla"></script> <script> const { Card, Button } = PrimitiveKit; const card = new Card({ variant: 'elevated' }); card.mount(document.body); </script>
data.class-based-components#Class-Based Compo:
All components are ES6 classes:
class Card { constructor(options) { this.element = null; this.options = options; this.render(); } render() { // Create DOM elements } mount(parent) { parent.appendChild(this.element); } unmount() { this.element.remove(); } destroy() { // Cleanup } }
data.creating-components#Creating Components:
Instantiate components with options:
const card = new Card({ variant: 'elevated', hoverable: true, clickable: false, className: 'custom-class', style: { marginTop: '1rem' } });
data.data-display-components#Data Display Com: Avatar - User avatar Tag - Tag label Table - Data table Collapse - Collapsible content Image - Image component Empty - Empty state Typography - Text styling
data.destroying-components#Destroying Compone:
Clean up components:
card.unmount(); // Remove from DOM card.destroy(); // Full cleanup
data.event-handling#Event Handling:
Pass event handlers in options:
const button = new Button({ text: 'Click Me', onClick: (event) => { console.log('Button clicked!', event); }, onFocus: (event) => { console.log('Button focused!', event); } });
data.features#Features: ✅ 39 Components - Complete component library ✅ Zero Dependencies - Pure JavaScript ✅ TypeScript - Full type definitions included ✅ 600+ Design Tokens - Comprehensive customization ✅ Zero Hardcoded Values - Everything customizable via CSS variables ✅ Accessible - WCAG 2.1 AA compliant ✅ Framework Agnostic - Works anywhere ✅ Small Bundle - Minimal footprint
data.feedback-components#Feedback Components: Alert - Alert messages Badge - Status indicators Spinner - Loading spinner Progress - Progress bar Skeleton - Loading placeholder
data.form-components#Form Components: Button - Interactive button Input - Text input field Select - Dropdown selection Checkbox - Checkbox input Radio - Radio button Switch - Toggle switch Textarea - Multi-line text input Slider - Range slider Form - Form wrapper Upload - File upload
data.form-example#Form Example: import { Form, Input, Button } from '@primitivekit/vanilla'; const nameInput = new Input({ placeholder: 'Enter your name', type: 'text' }); const submitButton = new Button({ text: 'Submit', type: 'submit' }); const form = new Form({ onSubmit: (event) => { event.preventDefault(); console.log('Form submitted!'); }, children: [nameInput, submitButton] }); form.mount(document.getElementById('app'));
data.installation#Installation:
npm install @primitivekit/vanilla Or use via CDN:
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/@primitivekit/vanilla/dist/tokens/tokens.css"> <script src="https://unpkg.com/@primitivekit/vanilla"></script>
data.layout-components#Layout Components: Card - Flexible container with variants Container - Responsive content wrapper Grid - Flexible grid system Stack - Vertical/horizontal stacking Space - Spacing between elements Divider - Visual separator
data.mounting-components#Mounting Components:
Mount components to the DOM:
const container = document.getElementById('app'); card.mount(container);
data.navigation-components#Navigation Compone: Link - Navigation link Breadcrumb - Breadcrumb navigation Tabs - Tab navigation Menu - Navigation menu Steps - Step indicator Pagination - Page navigation
data.overlay-components#Overlay Components: Modal - Modal dialog Drawer - Side drawer Tooltip - Tooltip overlay Popover - Popover overlay Dropdown - Dropdown menu
data.simple-button#Simple Button: import { Button } from '@primitivekit/vanilla'; const button = new Button({ text: 'Click Me', variant: 'primary', size: 'medium', onClick: () => alert('Clicked!') }); button.mount(document.body);
data.updating-components#Updating Components:
Update component properties:
card.update({ variant: 'outlined', hoverable: false });

data.data-display-components#Data Display Com: Avatar - User avatar Tag - Tag label Table - Data table Collapse - Collapsible content Image - Image component Empty - Empty state Typography - Text styling

✅ Semantic HTML elements ✅ Keyboard accessible ✅ Focus visible indicator ✅ Proper ARIA attributes ✅ Screen reader compatible ✅ Touch target size (44x44px minimum) ✅ Color contrast compliance
data.customization#Customization: The Table component supports CSS variables for complete customization: Custom
data.design-tokens#Design Tokens:
The following design tokens are available for customization:
--table-border-width --table-border-style --table-border-color --table-border-radius --table-background --table-header-background --table-header-padding --table-header-color --table-header-font-weight --table-header-border-bottom-width … and 31 more
data.keyboard-navigation#Keyboard Navigation: Key Action Tab Move focus to/from component
data.related-components#Related Components: Avatar - Component for displaying user profile images or initials in a circular or rounded container. Tag - Removable label component for displaying tags, filters, or selections. Collapse - Component for showing and hiding content sections with expand/collapse animation. Image - Enhanced image component with lazy loading, fallback, and aspect ratio support. Empty - Component for displaying empty states when no data or content is available.
data.see-also#See Also: Installation Guide Customization Guide Design Tokens Reference Accessibility Guide

data.related-components#Related Components: Link - Navigation component for creating accessible hyperlinks with various styles. Breadcrumb - Navigation component for showing the current page location in a hierarchical structure. Menu - Navigation component for displaying a list of actions or navigation links. Steps - Navigation component for showing progress through a multi-step process or wizard. Pagination - Navigation component for splitting content across multiple pages with page controls.

data.related-components#Related Components: Button - Interactive button component with multiple variants, sizes, and states for triggering actions. Input - Text input field component with validation, icons, and various input types. Select - Dropdown component for selecting one or multiple options from a list. Checkbox - Form input component for selecting one or multiple options from a set. Radio - Form input component for selecting a single option from a set of mutually exclusive choices.

data.related-components#Related Components: Modal - Overlay component for displaying content in a dialog that requires user interaction. Drawer - Overlay component for displaying a sliding panel from the edge of the screen. Popover - Overlay component for displaying rich content in a floating panel triggered by user interaction. Dropdown - Overlay component for displaying a menu or list of options triggered by a button.
